title: veronica repens subsp. cyanea
intro: Veronica repens subsp. cyanea, also known as Blue Veronica or Speedwell, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Veronica genus and is characterized by its blue-purple flowers and creeping habit. The medicinal properties of Veronica repens subsp. cyanea lie in its ability to stimulate digestion, improve circulation, and act as an antiseptic, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as support the immune system and reduce stress. Veronica repens subsp. cyanea can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits, or applied topically to wounds and skin irritations to take advantage of its antiseptic properties.
